title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for interacting with the Ollama server; chat, embed, pull, list models programmatically.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node or browsers via a lightweight wrapper around the REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that exposes Ollama models as LLM and Embeddings interfaces for chains, agents, RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, multi-user, dark mode, mobile-friendly).

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API and Android support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for chatting with Ollama models from Rails or plain Ruby scripts.

title: ollama-cli (npm)
summary: Lightweight CLI wrapper around ollama-js for quick prompts and piping from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-like pair programmer.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaEmbedder nodes for RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for running Ollama in Docker, Kubernetes, Home-Assistant, OBS, and more.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that lets a server chat with local Ollama models using slash commands.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix package derivation for Ollama enabling reproducible installs on Linux/macOS.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for reproducible LLM tests.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds a /ollama slash command for chatting with local models.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that connects to Ollama and demonstrates RAG with local PDFs.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API with serde types.

title: ollama-go
summary: Idiomatic Go client for Ollama with context cancellation and structured logging.

title: ollama-models
summary: Official registry of Modelfile recipes for Llama 3, Phi-3, Mistral, Gemma, CodeLlama and more.
